tools.name: application.getApplicationsStatus
tools.description: Remaining window and remaining count details, also returns reports that have been generated by this account.

tools.name: customReports.getReportsCustomCreate
tools.description: Used to create a custom report. This report treats the list of ids or handles as the audience (not their followers as in the twitter report). To create follower or tweet reports other methods must be used.

tools.name: customReports.getReportsCustomGenerate
tools.description: Used to create a custom report. This report treats the list of ids or handles as the audience (not their followers as in the twitter report). To create follower or tweet reports other methods must be used.

tools.name: customReports.getReportsCustomInsert
tools.description: Inserting twitter ids or handles into a custom report. This is used for custom reports only

tools.name: customReports.postReportsCustomCreate
tools.description: Used to create a custom report. This report treats the list of ids or handles as the audience (not their followers as in the twitter report). To create follower or tweet reports other methods must be used.

tools.name: customReports.postReportsCustomGenerate
tools.description: Used to create a custom report. This report treats the list of ids or handles as the audience (not their followers as in the twitter report). To create follower or tweet reports other methods must be used.

tools.name: customReports.postReportsCustomInsert
tools.description: Inserting twitter ids or handles into a custom report. This is used for custom reports only

tools.name: followerReports.getReportsTwitterCreate
tools.description: This report uses the twitter followers as the audience. To create custom or tweet reports other methods must be used. Any report older than two days will be automatically regenerated upon create.

tools.name: followerReports.postReportsTwitterCreate
tools.description: This report uses the twitter followers as the audience. To create custom or tweet reports other methods must be used. Any report older than two days will be automatically regenerated upon create.

tools.name: reports.getReports
tools.description: Output is ordered by Demographic and followed by Affinity information. For each data point the following metrics are provided value, count, mean, percentile, multiplicity and average. For Geographic, and Demographic data points an additional statistical_info metric will be present with information regarding statistical relevance.

tools.name: reports.getReportsDates
tools.description: Get report dates available for a specific report.

tools.name: reports.getReportsStatus
tools.description: Returns a list of custom reports generated by user (report name to upload hash etc).

tools.name: reports.postReports
tools.description: Output is ordered by Demographic and followed by Affinity information. For each data point the following metrics are provided value, count, mean, percentile, multiplicity and average. For Geographic, and Demographic data points an additional statistical_info metric will be present with information regarding statistical relevance.

tools.name: reports.postReportsDates
tools.description: Get report dates available for a specific report.

tools.name: reports.postReportsStatus
tools.description: Returns a list of custom reports generated by user (report name to upload hash etc).

tools.name: tweetReports.getReportsTweetCreate
tools.description: This report details the audience of the users who have tweeted content that matches what was provided in the keywords. To create custom or twitter reports other methods must be used.

tools.name: tweetReports.postReportsTweetCreate
tools.description: This report details the audience of the users who have tweeted content that matches what was provided in the keywords. To create custom or twitter reports other methods must be used.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
